source: shared fake-transport readiness planning and shared CommonFakeServiceReadinessGate prototype
description: Pins deterministic service-readiness waiting before feature readiness or service discovery waits move into shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Service-readiness waits in shared runtime must be bounded, observable, deterministic, and free from wall-clock sleeps before feature readiness is delegated to shared.

notes: This vector covers the shared fake-transport readiness gate only. Android and iOS service discovery, BLE service availability, and public facade error mapping remain platform-owned until a feature-specific runtime slice adds facade compatibility tests.
